changelog:
Viumo 1.0.6

Streaming was only the beginning.

- Watch movies and series together in Rooms

- Create your profile and keep your Viumo experience with you

- Save what you love and pick up where you left off

- Faster, smoother, and more reliable playback

This update remains optional while we continue improving the experience.
Welcome to the next chapter of Viumo.
Keep watching, keep enjoying.
